## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] Register / update a framework in the registry
- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, link, non-normative clarification)
- [ ] Foundation change (requires an RFC — link it below)
- [ ] Conformance checklist edit
- [ ] Governance / process / license

## Description

<!-- What and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Foundation changes: linked RFC is in `proposed` status → #
- [ ] Registry changes: both `frameworks.yaml` and the README table are updated
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
